mapper.sql: select a.account_id, a.elder_id, a.institution_id, a.account_no, a.account_name, a.account_status, a.total_balance, a.service_balance, a.deposit_balance, a.member_balance, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, e.elder_name, e.id_card, i.institution_name from account_info a left join elder_info e on a.elder_id = e.elder_id left join pension_institution i on a.institution_id = i.institution_id
mapper.select: where a.institution_id = #{institutionId} order by a.create_time desc

SELECT COUNT(*) as account_count, IFNULL(SUM(total_balance), 0) as total_balance_sum, IFNULL(SUM(service_balance), 0) as service_balance_sum, IFNULL(SUM(deposit_balance), 0) as deposit_balance_sum, IFNULL(SUM(member_balance), 0) as member_balance_sum, IFNULL(AVG(total_balance), 0) as avg_balance FROM account_info WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId} AND account_status = '1'

where a.account_status = '1' and a.service_balance < ( SELECT AVG(monthly_fee) FROM elder_check_in ec WHERE ec.check_in_status = '1' AND ec.elder_id = a.elder_id ) * #{months} order by a.service_balance asc
mapper.insert:
insert into account_info
elder_id, institution_id, account_no, account_name, account_status, total_balance, service_balance, deposit_balance, member_balance, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{elderId}, #{institutionId}, #{accountNo}, #{accountName}, #{accountStatus}, #{totalBalance}, #{serviceBalance}, #{depositBalance}, #{memberBalance}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark},
mapper.update: update account_info set total_balance = #{totalBalance}, service_balance = #{serviceBalance}, deposit_balance = #{depositBalance}, member_balance = #{memberBalance}, update_time = NOW() where account_id = #{accountId}
mapper.delete:
delete from account_info where account_id in
#{accountId}
